body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "Eric Leon" <eleon@kirkland.com>
Date: June 23, 2008 6:41:47 PM EDT
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Cc: "David Flugman" <dflugman@kirkland.com>
Subject: DB Zwirn Complaint


Darren -- attached is the most current version of the complaint against D.B. Zwirn.  We plan to hand a copy to the Schulte lawyers at tomorrow's meeting.  Please let me know if you have any last minute changes.  
Best,
Eric
